🇺🇸 Core Consumer Price
desc:
Crypto rally amid geopolitical tension and oil price uncertainty, with risk‑off sentiment for equities and risk‑on for crypto assets

🧠 KEY THEMES
🔴 Geopolitical conflict (Iran strike) 🔥
The death
telegramText: 🌙 EVENING INTELLIGENCE — Mar 1, 2026 Crypto rally amid geopolitical tension and oil price uncertainty, with risk‑off sentiment for equities and risk‑on for crypto assets 🧠 KEY THEMES 🔴 Geopolitical conflict (Iran strike) 🔥 The death of Iran’s Supreme Leader triggered US‑Israel strikes, sparking a sharp Bitcoin rally, oil price spikes, and a risk‑off mood in equities. Assets: BTC, ETH, OIL, SPY, TLT 🟢 Crypto market volatility 🔥 Bitcoin surged to $68k after the war, with high funding rates and massive liquidations, driving extreme volatility across major tokens. Assets: BTC, ETH, SOL 🟢 Oil price spike potential 📊 Oil above $80 could be inflationary; the conflict may push prices toward $100+, fueling inflation concerns. Assets: OIL 🔴 Equities risk‑off due to conflict 📊 US and Israel strikes caused a risk‑off sentiment, with SPY declining and TLT rising as investors seek safety. Assets: SPY, TLT 📐 SCENARIO SHIFTS ↓ Recession: Geopolitical tension and oil price rise dampen growth prospects. ↑ Stagflation: Oil price spike and inflationary pressures push commodity prices higher. ↑ Hegemony: US asserts military dominance, boosting risk‑on sentiment for US assets. ⚡ WATCHLIST 🟢 BTC: Strong rally after geopolitical shock and high funding rates. 🟢 ETH: Recovery to $2,000 and positive sentiment post‑strike. 👀 OIL: Potential price spike due to conflict‑driven supply concerns. 👀 GOLD: Inflationary pressure from oil could lift gold. 🤔 CONTRARIAN • Bitcoin will continue to rally as war ends, defying risk‑off consensus. • Oil will fall due to supply disruptions, contradicting inflation fears. ⚡ REGIME CHECK 🔴 Risk-Off · Neutral · STAGFLATION · Gauge: 91.6/100 📅 UPCOMING — HIGH IMPACT 🇺🇸 Core Consumer Price Index (Unseasonally Adjusted) (YoY)(Feb) — Mar 11, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 2.5%) 🇺🇸 Unseasonally Adjusted Consumer Price Index (YoY)(Feb) — Mar 11, 12:30 PM UTC (prev: 2.4%) 🇺🇸 NAR seasonally adjusted existing home sales (AAMR)(Feb) — Mar 10, 02:00 PM UTC (prev: -8.4%) 🌍 Real GDP(billion yen) (Revised) (Q4) — Mar 9, 11:50 PM UTC (prev: 589727.6) 🌍 Real GDP(QoQ) (Revised) (Q4) — Mar 9, 11:50 PM UTC (prev: 0.1%) agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
